hero.headline: Specialized Pediatric Care. Right at Home.
hero.subheadline: Prestige 24 Home Care provides skilled nursing and personal care for medically fragile children through Georgia's GAPP program, delivered in the comfort and safety of your child's home, at no cost to qualifying families.
hero.tagline: Georgia's trusted GAPP provider. Skilled pediatric care families can rely on.

gapp.sectionSubtitle: Trusted Pediatric Home Care Through Georgia’s Medicaid-Funded Initiative
gapp.whatIsGapp: The Georgia Pediatric Program (GAPP) is a Medicaid-funded initiative that provides skilled nursing and personal care services to medically fragile children under age 21. These services are delivered in the comfort and safety of the child’s home at no cost to families. Medicaid-eligible families may apply, with approval determined by the child’s specific medical needs.

noCost.title: No Cost to Families
noCost.description: Services are 100% covered by Georgia Medicaid, ensuring zero out-of-pocket expenses for qualifying families.

licensedNurses.title: Licensed Nurses
licensedNurses.description: Board-certified RNs and LPNs with pediatric specializations and ongoing clinical training.

personalizedPlans.title: Personalized Plans
personalizedPlans.description: Custom care plans developed in collaboration with your family and your child’s medical team.

noWaitlist.title: No Waitlist
noWaitlist.description: Your child will be eligible for services immediately upon GAPP approval.

dailyCare.title: Daily Care & Mobility
items: Personal Hygiene: Comprehensive assistance with bathing, dressing, and hygiene
Mobility Support: Expert wheelchair assistance and routine turning or repositioning to ensure comfort
Home Comfort: Regular changing of bed linens and support with activities of daily living (ADLs)

clinicalSupport.title: Clinical & Medical Support
items: Medication Management: Precise administration of prescribed medications
Enteral Nutrition: Gastrostomy tube (G-tube) feeding, cleaning, and site maintenance
Vitals & Monitoring: Continuous observation and tracking of vital signs to monitor health status

respiratoryCare.title: Advanced Respiratory Care
items: Tracheostomy Management: Professional trach care, cleaning, and suctioning
Respiratory Therapy: Administration of breathing treatments and manual bagging via trach or mouth

careCoordination.title: Care Coordination
items: Clinical Communication: Detailed gathering of treatment plan data and immediate reporting of health changes to doctors or nurses

gapp.gettingStartedSubtitle: Follow these four steps to begin receiving specialized care for your child.

step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.description: Contact our intake team to discuss your child’s specific medical needs and daily routine.

step2.title: Eligibility Review
step2.description: We will help you verify Georgia Medicaid or TEFRA eligibility to ensure your services are covered.

step3.title: In-Home Assessment
step3.description: A Registered Nurse (RN) will visit your home to conduct a clinical evaluation and determine the required level of care.

step4.title: Caregiver Matching
step4.description: Once approved, we coordinate your customized treatment plan and match your family with a qualified nurse or aide.

gapp.timelineNote: Please note that the intake and evaluation process typically takes up to 30 days to complete.

whyUs.sectionSubtitle: Choosing care for your child is one of the most important decisions you'll make. At Prestige 24 Home Care, we combine pediatric expertise with genuine compassion to ensure every child receives attentive, reliable support.

personalized.title: Personalized Attention
personalized.description: Tailored to each child’s medical and personal needs.

caregivers.title: Carefully Selected Caregivers
caregivers.description: With pediatric training and experience families can trust.

consistency.title: Consistency & Reliability
consistency.description: So children and families feel secure and supported.

communication.title: Transparent Communication
communication.description: With families and healthcare providers every step of the way.

paperwork.title: Medicaid & Paperwork Assistance
paperwork.description: Navigating GAPP enrollment, Medicaid paperwork, and care coordination.

whyUs.closing: From the first consultation through daily care, we provide concierge-level service designed to make life easier, safer, and more comfortable for your child at home.

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Hear from families who trust Prestige 24 Home Care with their children's care.

reviews.name: Maria L.
reviews.text: Prestige 24 has been a blessing for our family. The nurses are professional, compassionate, and truly care about my child’s well-being. I finally have peace of mind knowing my child is in good hands.

reviews.name: Denise R.
reviews.text: Finding quality GAPP nurses felt impossible until we connected with Prestige 24. They matched us with an amazing nurse who understands my son's trach care needs, and the whole process was smooth from day one.

reviews.name: Sandra W.
reviews.text: From the very first consultation, Prestige 24 made us feel heard and supported. The GAPP program enrollment was seamless, and our daughter now receives the specialized nursing care she needs at home.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: Getting started with Prestige 24 Home Care is simple. We guide you through every step.

steps.title: Contact Us
steps.description: Reach out by phone or through our contact form to tell us about your child's care needs.

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.description: Schedule a consultation with one of our pediatric specialists to explore how we can provide the best care for your child.

steps.title: Personalized Care Plan
steps.description: We develop a customized care plan based on your child's medical needs, daily routine, and family preferences.

steps.title: Care Begins
steps.description: Your matched nurse or aide begins providing professional, compassionate care in the comfort of your home.

contact.sectionSubtitle: Fill out the form below and a member of our intake team will contact you within 24 hours.
